communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Louisiana Public Records Law, I hereby request the following records:

- Any autopsy and/or death reports regarding Mamuka Artmeladze, who was declared dead on June 4, 2026, at Winn Parish Medical Center: https://www.ice.gov/news/releases/ice-detainee-passes-away-louisiana-0

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 3 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

CJ Ciaramella

title: Asbestos records for Northwest Arctic Schools

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

Please provide any documents responsive to request #EPA-R10-2018-004441, received on Feb. 14, 2018.

The subject of the initial request is copied below:

Please provide certified copies of all records you possess related to asbestos at the following locations:1) June Nelson Elementary at 744 Third Ave, Kotzebue, AK 99752; 2) Ambler School at Ambler Ave, Ambler, AK 99786; 3) Buckland School at 9900 University Drive, Buckland, AK 99727; 4) Deering School at 36 Main St, Deering, AK 99736; 5) Kiana School at 190 Casonoff St, Kiana, AK 99749; 6) McQueen School at 111 Mcqueen, Kivalina, AK 99750; 11) Kobuk School at 101 Mushers Way, Kobuk, AK 99751; 7) Noorvik Elementary at 165 Fireweed Dr. Noorvik, AK 99763; 8) Davis-Ramoth School at 119 Tundra Drive, Selawik, AK 99770; 9) Shungnak School at 6 West River Rd, Shungnak, AK 99773; and 10) The Northwest Arctic School District Office at 744 Third Ave, Kotzebue, AK 99752. If there are any fees for searching or copying these records, please inform me if the cost will exceed $200.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 20 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Desiree Hagen
